plugins.name: vix
plugins.description: Token-efficient AI coding patterns for Claude Code — ported from vix (github.com/get-vix/vix). Provides structured Explore→Plan→Implement→Review workflow, tool discipline skills, and a TypeScript MCP server with minified file reads/edits and background bash jobs.
